title: The Big Picture Peace In Ukraine Good Or Bad For Tanker Freight
section_path: The Big Picture Peace In Ukraine Good Or Bad For Tanker Freight
section_path_text: The Big Picture Peace In Ukraine Good Or Bad For Tanker Freight
summary:
Main
Focus has returned in recent days to the possibility of an end to the war between Russia and Ukraine, and what this could mean for tankers. The detail of the latest iteration of the US-led peace initiative is likely to prove difficult for Russian to swallow. We should find out next week when Trump's envoy Steve Witkoff visits Moscow.
